heading: <0>Powerful <1>Features</1></0>
description: Discover the powerful features that make DashAI the ultimate platform for AI experimentation

dataExplorer.title: Data Explorer
dataExplorer.description: Explore, clean, and prepare your data in an intuitive visual environment: perform dynamic, visual, and guided exploratory data analyses (EDA) directly within DashAI.

mlExperimentation.title: ML Experimentation
mlExperimentation.description: Set up and manage your ML experiments with an intuitive interface. Select models, configure hyperparameters, and define evaluation metrics without writing a single line of code.

resultsVisualization.title: Results Visualization
resultsVisualization.description: Compare model performance across multiple experiments. Interactive dashboards help you identify the best performing models and understand their behavior through comprehensive metrics and visualizations.

modelExplainability.title: Model Explainability
modelExplainability.description: Understand how your models make decisions. Generate feature importance plots, SHAP values, and interpretable visualizations that help you trust and debug your AI models.

generativeModule.title: Generative Module
generativeModule.description: Experiment with generative AI models seamlessly. Generate text, images, and other content while visualizing the generation process and fine-tuning parameters in real-time.
